testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: msedgedriver at location C:\Users\buban\AppData\Local\Microsoft\EdgeWebDriver\msedgedriver.exe, does not exist For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location/ Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.8' Driver info: driver.version: EdgeDriver
